report.description: Main deep-read report with 23 sections covering problem hook, framework, dataset, results per stage, interventions, limitations, ethics, claim index, and follow-up questions

traceability_manifest.description: Claim-to-evidence links for all 15 claims (C1.1–C3.6) across all three stages

research_lens.description: Problem reconstruction with research equation, tri-pass notes (first/second/third), and challenge-module map

direction_board.description: 7 ranked research direction seeds: cross-cultural GRPO generalization, user-specific reward models, cross-model verification, dynamic attribute updating, surface-vs-substantive judge training, GRPO distillation, and reward model scaling analysis

references_dir.description: Placeholder for reference papers or supporting materials
